args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', o.CreatedDate) = '2023-04' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', o.CreatedDate) = '2023-04' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate::DATE) - julianday(o.CreatedDate::DATE)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01' AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate::DATE) - julianday(o.CreatedDate::DATE)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01' AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julian(c.CompanySignedDate::DATE) - julian(o.CreatedDate::DATE)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2023-04-01' AND CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) < DATE '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;
